conventions.name: Project Wiki
conventions.description: Maintain a .wiki/ of durable codebase knowledge (gotchas, decisions, glossary) in this project's tree.

conventions.name: Orchestrator Wiki
conventions.description: Maintain the conductor's machine-local .conduct/wiki/ of cross-project and per-project conducting knowledge.

scaffolds.name: Project Wiki Seed
scaffolds.description: One-time setup instructions for the first worker to create this project's .wiki/, in-tree or out-of-tree.
